questions.question: Explain String Library Functions and its primary use case in C Programming.
questions.answer: String Library Functions provides a structured mechanism to handle core application logic cleanly.

questions.question: What are common mistakes developers make with String Library Functions?
questions.answer: Common issues include scoping errors, unhandled boundary cases, and improper resource cleanup.

questions.question: How does the C Programming runtime optimize String Library Functions under the hood?
questions.answer: The runtime engine uses symbol tables, call stack frames, and bytecode optimization to run instructions efficiently.
